title: Reliquified Twilight Forest
description: Compatibility addon between Relics & Twilight Forest
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/wWM3IZQ.png)

Reliquified Twilight Forest is a compatibility addon between Relics and Twilight Forest, adding several unique thematic relics to the Twilight Forest dimension. This addon adds a bunch of new and exciting relics, which can be obtained by defeating bosses from the Twilight Forest. These relics grant players some of the abilities possessed by their original owners.

This mod requires Relics and The Twilight Forest!

![Art](https://i.imgur.com/V2jX1pa.png)
